changelog: Email update, camera password toggle, improved event search with date filters
changes: UX: Contact email updated to info@sentinelvision.net.za across all pages
UX: Camera scan -- password fields now have show/hide toggle eye button
UX: Events page -- search now matches camera name, location, date and detection type
UX: Events page -- date range From/To filters added to narrow events by date
UX: Events page -- search box has clear (x) button
UX: Website -- Weapon Detection now clearly labelled as BETA with accuracy disclaimer
